nasb.text: Or do you not know that all of us who have been baptized into Christ Jesus have been baptized into His death?

esv.text: Do you not know that all of us who have been baptized into Christ Jesus were baptized into his death?

cnv.text: 難道你們不曉得我們這受洗歸入基督耶穌的人，是受洗歸入他的死嗎？

ccb.text: 难道你们不知道，我们受洗归属基督耶稣是和祂一同死吗？

csbs.text: 难道你们不明白，所有受洗归入基督耶稣的人，就是受洗归入了他的死吗？
